sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14422" key="a)pro/qesmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπρό-θεσμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n14422.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not fixed to any definite time,</tr_> opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐμπρόθεσμος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
